title: Visions of Time
description: The Priest of Chronos has received troubling visions of events to come. He requires you to deliver a sealed prophecy to the Temple of Time in Thornfield, where the High Chronist can properly interpret its meaning. Time is of the essence - the prophecy must not fall into the wrong hands.

objectives.description: Receive the sealed prophecy from the Priest of Chronos
Deliver the prophecy to the High Chronist
